---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

## Importing Libraries and Loading Dataset
```{python}
import pandas as pd
data=pd.read_csv("C:/Users/Udith P Kidiyoor/Downloads/education_districtwise.csv")
data.head(10)
```
## Dataset Overview
# Data Information and Structure
```{python}
data.info()
```
## Missing Value Analysis
```{python}
data.isna().sum()
```
## Data Cleaning
```{python}
data=data.dropna()
```
## Random Sampling of the Dataset
```{python}
sample_data=data.sample(n=50, replace=True, random_state=42)
sample_data
```
## Calculating Sample Mean
```{python}
sample_mean=sample_data["OVERALL_LI"].mean()
sample_mean
# 73.6594
```
## Computing Standard Error
```{python}
import numpy as np
sample_standard_error=data["OVERALL_LI"].std()/np.sqrt(data.shape[0])
sample_standard_error
```
## Confidence Interval Estimation
```{python}
from scipy import stats
stats.norm.interval(confidence= 0.95, loc=sample_mean, scale= sample_standard_error)
```
